name: Thurn and Taxis
description: Thurn and Taxis is Andreas and Karen Seyfarth's Spiel-des-Jahres 2006 winner — build postal routes across early-modern Bavaria by chaining city cards into uninterrupted sequences, then claim post-offices along your trail. Bonus tiles reward longest routes, full regions, and complete duchies. Tight, elegant, and endlessly replayable.
